markdown:
#  View Users in Your Free Procore Account 
##### Limited Release
[Free Procore accounts](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/tutorials/create-a-free-procore-company-account) are currently only available in the United States and Canada.
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/permissions)
  * Users are sorted alphabetically. Click the header if you want to switch to from ascending or descending order.


##  Steps 
  1. [ Log in to your free Procore account](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/tutorials/log-in-to-your-free-procore-account).
  2. Click the **Team** page.
  3. If you want to view more details for a user, click on the user's name in the **Name** column.  
This directs you to the full user profile where you can edit information and permissions if needed. See [Edit a User in Your Free Procore Account](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/tutorials/edit-a-user-in-your-free-procore-account).


## See Also
  * [Free Procore Account - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/permissions)
  * [Add a User to Your Free Procore Account](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/tutorials/add-a-user-to-your-free-procore-account)
  * [Edit a User in Your Free Procore Account](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/tutorials/edit-a-user-in-your-free-procore-account)
title: View Users in Your Free Procore Account
description: How to view users on the Team page of your free Procore account.
